description: Capability for player windows (one per open video). These windows are created dynamically with labels like 'player-<sceneId>', so we match with a glob. Player windows need libmpv (video playback), core window/event access, opener (optional 'open file in explorer'), and dialog. allow-destroy is required for any JS onCloseRequested listener: Tauri's JS wrapper completes a non-prevented close by calling window.destroy() (used by the 4Play quad window). Asset protocol scope is global (defined in tauri.conf.json).
